title: Vanilla Protein Mousse
description: High protein breakfast option thats quick to prepare and delicious!
ingredients: Optional Toppings (Mixed berries, dark chocolate, granola)
method: Blend the cashews until they are a rough powder.
Add the rest of the ingredients and blend until smooth and creamy.
Pour evenly into 3 serving pots or jars.
Refrigerate for 2 to 3 hours (or overnight if you can wait that long).
